description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that defines three stages: build, test, and deploy, and sets GOPATH to the current directory and DEPLOY_PATH to the sibling deploy directory in a before_script. In the build stage add a vet job using the golang:1.5 image that runs a loop over all *.go files executing `go tool vet -composites=false -unusedresult=false $f`. In the test stage add a go-test-1.5 job using golang:1.5 that runs `go test`. In the deploy stage add a go-build-1.5 job using golang:1.5 that runs `apt-get update`, `apt-get -q -y install rsync`, removes any existing contents of $DEPLOY_PATH, creates $DEPLOY_PATH, and syncs the repository to $DEPLOY_PATH with rsync excluding .git, .gitignore, and .gitlab-ci.yml.
